summary: Audience recording praised by some for crystal‑clear sound and full bass, called the worst AUD by another reviewer; the concert itself is described as an explosive, powerful show from start to finish.
review: The performance is universally lauded as a five‑star, high‑energy gig that kept listeners on fire from opening through the finale. Recording quality opinions diverge – one reviewer hails it as “crystal‑clear” while another dubs it the worst‑sounding AUD and a third calls it merely listenable – indicating an overall mixed technical impression.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is consistently praised (4–5 ★), but recording feedback ranges from excellent to poor, pulling the average rating toward the middle; four reviews give a moderate confidence level.

recording_quality.technical_notes: One reviewer describes the sound as crystal‑clear with full bass, another says it is the worst sounding AUD, and a third calls all AUDs “very listenable” but places this one at the bottom of the list. Overall comments indicate mixed clarity and balance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert is repeatedly called explosive, powerful and a five‑star experience from start to finish, suggesting strong pacing and overall flow.
